# docpick — Full API Reference
> Document in, structured JSON out. Schema-driven extraction with local OCR + LLM.

## Install
```
pip install docpick[paddle|easyocr|got|mcp|all]
```
Python >=3.11. Core deps: pydantic>=2.0, pydantic-settings>=2.0, Pillow>=10.0, pypdfium2>=4.0, httpx>=0.27, pyyaml>=6.0, click>=8.0, rich>=13.0.

## CLI
```bash
docpick extract invoice.pdf --schema invoice
docpick extract receipt.jpg --schema receipt --ocr paddle --output result.json
docpick ocr document.pdf --format markdown
docpick batch ./docs/ --schema invoice --output ./out/ --concurrency 4
docpick schemas list|show <name>
docpick validate result.json --schema invoice
docpick config show|set <key> <value>
```

## Configuration
Config: `~/.docpick/config.yaml` + env overrides with `DOCPICK_` prefix (e.g. `DOCPICK_OCR_ENGINE`).

| Key | Type | Default |
|-----|------|---------|
| ocr.engine | `auto\|paddle\|easyocr\|got\|vlm` | `auto` |
| ocr.languages | `list[str]` | `["ko","en"]` |
| ocr.gpu | `auto\|true\|false` | `auto` |
| ocr.confidence_threshold | `float` | `0.7` |
| llm.provider | `vllm\|ollama\|openai` | `vllm` |
| llm.base_url | `str` | `http://localhost:8000/v1` |
| llm.model | `str` | `Qwen/Qwen3.5-32B-AWQ` |
| llm.temperature | `float` | `0.0` |
| llm.max_tokens | `int` | `4096` |
| llm.timeout | `int` | `30` |
| vlm.enabled | `bool` | `false` |
| vlm.base_url | `str` | `http://localhost:11434/v1` |
| vlm.model | `str` | `Qwen/Qwen3-VL-4B` |
| output.format | `json\|csv\|markdown` | `json` |
| output.include_confidence | `bool` | `true` |
| output.include_bbox | `bool` | `false` |
| validation.enabled | `bool` | `true` |
| validation.strict | `bool` | `false` |

## API — Core Classes

### DocpickConfig(BaseSettings)
`.load(config_path: Path|None=None) -> DocpickConfig` — Load YAML + env overrides
`.save(config_path: Path|None=None) -> None` — Save to YAML
Fields: `ocr: OCRConfig`, `llm: LLMConfig`, `vlm: VLMConfig`, `output: OutputConfig`, `validation: ValidationConfig`

### DocpickPipeline
```python
DocpickPipeline(config: DocpickConfig|None = None)
```
`.extract(source, schema, mode, languages) -> ExtractionResult` — Main extraction entry point
`.ocr_engine -> OCREngine` — Lazy-initialized OCR engine
`.llm_provider -> LLMProvider` — Lazy-initialized LLM provider

#### extract() Parameters
| param | type | default | desc |
|-------|------|---------|------|
| source | `str\|Path\|Image.Image` | required | File path or PIL Image |
| schema | `type[BaseModel]\|None` | `None` | Pydantic model; None=OCR only |
| mode | `str` | `"auto"` | `auto\|ocr+llm\|vlm\|ocr_only` |
| languages | `list[str]\|None` | `None` | OCR langs; None=use config |

Mode logic: `auto` = VLM if enabled+schema, else OCR+LLM if schema, else OCR only.

### ExtractionResult
| field | type | desc |
|-------|------|------|
| data | `dict[str,Any]` | Extracted structured fields |
| confidence | `dict[str,float]` | Per-field confidence 0.0-1.0 |
| validation | `ValidationResult` | Validation result |
| ocr_result | `OCRResult\|None` | Raw OCR output |
| text | `str` | Raw OCR text |
| markdown | `str` | OCR text as markdown |
| schema_name | `str` | Schema class name |
| mode | `str` | Mode used |
| processing_time_ms | `float` | Total time ms |
| errors | `list[str]` | Error messages |
`.to_json(pretty: bool=True) -> str` — Serialize to JSON

### OCRResult
| field | type | desc |
|-------|------|------|
| text | `str` | Full recognized text |
| blocks | `list[TextBlock]` | Text blocks with positions |
| tables | `list[Table]` | Detected tables |
| layout | `LayoutInfo\|None` | Document layout info |
| metadata | `dict[str,Any]` | Engine-specific metadata |
| engine | `str` | Engine name |
| processing_time_ms | `float` | OCR time ms |
`.avg_confidence -> float` — Average confidence across blocks
`.low_confidence_blocks -> list[TextBlock]` — Blocks with confidence < 0.7
`.to_markdown() -> str` — Convert to structured markdown

### TextBlock
`text: str`, `bbox: tuple[float,float,float,float]` (x1,y1,x2,y2 normalized 0-1), `confidence: float`, `page: int=0`, `block_type: str="text"` (text|title|table|figure|header|footer)

### Table
`cells: list[TableCell]`, `bbox: tuple[float,float,float,float]`, `page: int=0`, `rows: int=0`, `cols: int=0`
`.to_markdown() -> str` — Markdown table with header separator
TableCell: `text: str`, `row: int`, `col: int`, `row_span: int=1`, `col_span: int=1`

### LayoutInfo
`page_count: int=1`, `is_scanned: bool=False`, `has_tables: bool=False`, `has_figures: bool=False`, `detected_languages: list[str]=[]`, `orientation: int=0`

### ValidationResult
`is_valid: bool=True`, `errors: list[ValidationError]=[]`, `warnings: list[ValidationWarning]=[]`, `rules_applied: int=0`, `rules_passed: int=0`
ValidationError: `field: str`, `rule: str`, `message: str`, `expected: Any=None`, `actual: Any=None`
ValidationWarning: `field: str`, `rule: str`, `message: str`

### BatchProcessor & BatchResult
```python
BatchProcessor(config: DocpickConfig|None=None, concurrency: int=4)
```
`.process_directory(directory, schema, mode, languages, recursive, on_progress) -> BatchResult`

| param | type | default | desc |
|-------|------|---------|------|
| directory | `str\|Path` | required | Directory path |
| schema | `type[BaseModel]\|None` | `None` | Pydantic model |
| mode | `str` | `"auto"` | Extraction mode |
| recursive | `bool` | `False` | Search subdirs |
| on_progress | `Callable[[int,int],None]\|None` | `None` | Callback (done, total) |

BatchResult: `total: int`, `succeeded: int`, `failed: int`, `results: dict[str,ExtractionResult]`, `errors: dict[str,str]`, `processing_time_ms: float`
`.summary -> dict[str,Any]`

### DocumentLoader
```python
DocumentLoader(dpi: int=300)
```
`.load(path) -> list[Image.Image]` — Load all pages
`.iter_pages(path) -> Iterator[Image.Image]` — Memory-efficient page iterator
`.is_supported(path) -> bool` — Supported: pdf, png, jpg, jpeg, tiff, tif, bmp, webp
`.detect_type(path) -> str` — Returns `"image"` or `"pdf"`

## API — OCR Engines
All implement `OCREngine(ABC)`:
`.recognize(image, languages) -> OCRResult`
`.recognize_file(path, languages) -> OCRResult`
`.is_available() -> bool`, `.name -> str`, `.requires_gpu -> bool`, `.supported_languages -> list[str]`

| Engine | Class | Extra | GPU | Notes |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|-------|
| auto | `AutoEngine` | core | no | Tier1(paddle>easyocr)→Tier2(got>vlm) fallback on low confidence |
| paddle | `PaddleOCREngine` | `[paddle]` | no | PaddleOCR v5, 111 langs, default |
| easyocr | `EasyOCREngine` | `[easyocr]` | opt | 80+ langs, Korean-optimized |
| got | `GOTOCREngine` | `[got]` | yes | 580M param transformer OCR |
| vlm | `VLMOCREngine` | core | yes | OpenAI-compatible vision API |

AutoEngine extra params: `confidence_threshold: float=0.7`, `enable_fallback: bool=True`
EasyOCREngine: `use_gpu: bool=False`
GOTOCREngine: `model_name: str="stepfun-ai/GOT-OCR-2.0-hf"`, `device: str="auto"`, `ocr_type: str="ocr"` (ocr|format)
VLMOCREngine: `base_url`, `model`, `temperature`, `max_tokens`, `timeout`
`get_engine(name: str="auto", **kwargs) -> OCREngine` — Factory function
`estimate_complexity(image: Image.Image) -> float` — 0.0=simple, 1.0=complex

## API — LLM Providers
All implement `LLMProvider(ABC)`:
`.extract_fields(text, schema, context, max_retries) -> dict[str,Any]`
`.extract_from_image(image_base64, schema, max_retries) -> dict[str,Any]`
`.is_available() -> bool`, `.name -> str`

| Provider | Class | Default base_url | Default model |
|----------|-------|-----------------|---------------|
| vllm | `VLLMProvider` | `http://localhost:8000/v1` | `Qwen/Qwen3.5-32B-AWQ` |
| ollama | `OllamaProvider` | `http://localhost:11434` | `qwen3.5:7b` |

All providers accept: `base_url`, `model`, `temperature=0.0`, `max_tokens=4096`, `timeout` (vllm:30, ollama:60).
VLLMProvider sends `chat_template_kwargs: {"enable_thinking": false}` with every request.
`get_provider(provider_name: str="vllm", **kwargs) -> LLMProvider` — Factory function

### Prompt Utilities (docpick.llm.prompt)
`build_extraction_prompt(text, schema, context) -> list[dict]` — Chat messages for LLM extraction
`build_vlm_extraction_prompt(schema) -> list[dict]` — Chat messages for VLM (caller appends image)
`parse_llm_json(response: str) -> dict` — Parse JSON from LLM response; handles code blocks, trailing commas
`build_retry_messages(failed_response: str) -> list[dict]` — Retry messages for failed JSON

## API — Schemas
All extend `DocumentSchema(BaseModel)` with `extra="allow"`. Auto-registered in `schema_registry`.

### SchemaRegistry
`schema_registry.register(name, schema) -> None`
`schema_registry.get(name) -> type[DocumentSchema]` — Raises KeyError
`schema_registry.list() -> dict[str, type[DocumentSchema]]`
`schema_registry.names() -> list[str]`

### Built-in Schemas
| Name | Key Fields | Line Items | Validations |
|------|-----------|------------|-------------|
| `invoice` | invoice_number, dates, currency, vendor_*, customer_*, subtotal, tax_amount, total_amount | InvoiceLineItem(desc, qty, unit, unit_price, amount, tax_rate, hs_code) | sum_equals, date_before, check_digit(tax_id), required |
| `receipt` | merchant_*, receipt_number, transaction_date/time, subtotal, tax, tip, total | ReceiptLineItem(desc, qty, unit_price, total_price, category) | sum_equals, check_digit, required |
| `bill_of_lading` | bl_number, shipper_*, consignee_*, vessel, ports, containers, freight_* | ContainerDetail(container#, seal#, type, packages, weight, cbm) | required, date_before, sum_equals, regex |
| `purchase_order` | po_number, buyer_*, seller_*, subtotal, tax_amount, total_amount | POLineItem(line#, item#, desc, qty, unit, unit_price, amount) | required, sum_equals, date_before |
| `kr_tax_invoice` | approval_number, supplier_*/buyer_*(biz#,name,rep,addr), totals | TaxInvoiceLineItem(date, name, spec, qty, prices, tax) | required, check_digit(kr_biz#), sum_equals |
| `bank_statement` | bank, account_number/holder, iban, balances, transactions | Transaction(date, desc, ref, debit, credit, balance) | required, date_before, check_digit(IBAN) |
| `id_document` | doc_type/number, issuing_*, name, nationality, dates, sex, mrz | -- | required, date_before, regex |
| `certificate_of_origin` | cert_number, exporter_*, consignee_*, origin, items | CertificateItem(desc, hs_code, qty, weight, value) | required, regex(ISO 3166-1) |

## API — Validation

### Validation Rules
All extend `ValidationRule(ABC)`: `.validate(data) -> ValidationError|ValidationWarning|None`, `.name -> str`
`Validator(rules: list[ValidationRule]|None=None)` → `.validate(data) -> ValidationResult`

| Rule | Constructor | Behavior |
|------|------------|----------|
| `RequiredFieldRule` | `(field: str)` | Warning if field missing/empty |
| `SumEqualsRule` | `(sources: str\|list[str], target: str, tolerance: float=0.01)` | Sum of sources == target; dot-notation for arrays |
| `DateBeforeRule` | `(before_field: str, after_field: str)` | before <= after (ISO string) |
| `FieldEqualsRule` | `(field_a: str, field_b: str)` | a == b |
| `RangeRule` | `(field: str, min_val: float\|None, max_val: float\|None)` | Numeric within [min, max] |
| `RegexRule` | `(field: str, pattern: str, description: str="")` | Field matches regex |
| `CheckDigitRule` | `(field: str, algorithm: str)` | Algorithms: `kr_business_number`, `luhn`, `iso_6346`, `awb_mod7`, `iban_mod97` |

### Checksum Functions (docpick.validation.checksum)
`verify_kr_business_number(v) -> bool` — Korean 10-digit biz number
`verify_luhn(v) -> bool` — Credit card checksum
`verify_iso_6346(v) -> bool` — Container number
`verify_awb_mod7(v) -> bool` — Air Waybill 11-digit mod7
`verify_iban_mod97(v) -> bool` — IBAN ISO 13616

### Cross-Document Validation
```python
CrossDocumentValidator()
```
`.add_mapping(source_doc, source_field, target_doc, target_field, rule="equals", tolerance=0.01, desc="") -> None`
Rules: `equals`, `less_than_or_equal`, `contains`
`.validate(documents: dict[str, dict]) -> CrossDocumentResult`
CrossDocumentResult: `is_valid`, `errors`, `warnings`, `checks_applied`, `checks_passed`
`create_trade_document_validator() -> CrossDocumentValidator` — Pre-configured Invoice<->B/L<->PackingList<->CertOfOrigin

## MCP Server
Entry: `docpick-mcp` (stdio). Tools:
`extract_document(file_path: str, schema: str="invoice", ocr_engine: str="auto", output_format: str="json") -> str`
`ocr_document(file_path: str, engine: str="auto") -> str` — Returns JSON: text, markdown, engine, avg_confidence, block_count, table_count, processing_time_ms
`list_schemas() -> str` — JSON array of {name, fields}

## Examples
```python
# Basic extraction
from docpick import DocpickPipeline
from docpick.schemas import InvoiceSchema
result = DocpickPipeline().extract("invoice.pdf", schema=InvoiceSchema)
print(result.data, result.confidence, result.validation.is_valid)
```
```python
# Batch processing
from docpick.batch import BatchProcessor
from docpick.schemas import InvoiceSchema
batch = BatchProcessor(concurrency=8)
result = batch.process_directory("./invoices/", schema=InvoiceSchema, recursive=True)
for path, r in result.results.items(): print(path, r.data.get("total_amount"))
```
```python
# Custom schema + validation
from docpick.schemas.base import DocumentSchema, schema_registry
from docpick.validation.rules import RequiredFieldRule, RegexRule
class ShippingLabel(DocumentSchema):
    tracking_number: str | None = None
    recipient_name: str | None = None
    class ValidationRules:
        rules = [RequiredFieldRule("tracking_number"), RegexRule("tracking_number", r"^[A-Z0-9]{10,30}$")]
schema_registry.register("shipping_label", ShippingLabel)
```

- [Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/docpick) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/docpick/) | [Issues](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/docpick/issues)
